{{CargoRelic
|name=Killer Diary Vol. 390
|class_id=20467
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A secret manual exclusive to a one-thousand-year-old assassin family that records the previous generations' experience in the practice of assassination. The skills and techniques in the manual help assassins train more effectively. It is a treasure that most assassins are dying to obtain. But it's later found to be only the remnants.
|fame=30
|art=10
|fth=17
|civ=15
|tech=18
|ss1=Per Grandmaster Scroll used, Snail DEF +1<br>Grandmaster Scrolls Used: 50/50
|ss2=Per Grandmaster Scroll used, Snail DEF +2<br>Grandmaster Scrolls Used: 50/50
|ss3=Per Grandmaster Scroll used, Snail DEF +3<br>Grandmaster Scrolls Used: 50/50
|ss4=Per Grandmaster Scroll used, Snail DEF +3<br>Grandmaster Scrolls Used: 50/50
|ss7=Per Grandmaster Scroll used, Snail DEF +3<br>Grandmaster Scrolls Used: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
